feature_rows.source_semantic: Is the catalyst newly strengthening, still active, or already stale?
Does the catalyst keep receiving cross-day confirmation instead of fading into one-off narrative memory?
Is the catalyst still expanding through the cohort, or is only the core name holding up?
feature_rows.implementation_basis: cross-symbol same-day breadth from positive ret_5 and above-ma20 cohort share

interpretation: The v2 schema adds bounded semantics rather than a generic catalyst feature explosion.
All three additions are stage-targeted and remain derivable from the same frozen dataset plus cross-symbol cohort context.
The next lawful move is to rerun the same pilot baseline and sidecar with these added semantics.
